name: Ubiquiti UniFi Travel Router
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Travel Router
description: The UniFi Travel Router (UTR) is an ultra-slim, lightweight router designed to bring your UniFi Network experience with you wherever you travel.

detailed_description.heading: Portable Travel Router
detailed_description.text: The UniFi Travel Router (UTR) is an ultra-slim, lightweight router designed to bring your UniFi Network experience with you wherever you travel. Whether you are working from a hotel, a temporary office, or a remote site, UTR allows you to instantly extend secure and familiar connectivity without complex setup. It operates in stand-alone mode and does not require a UniFi account, making it ideal for quick deployments and personal use. Supporting both wired Ethernet and WiFi uplinks, the device adapts easily to different network environments. Despite its compact size, UTR delivers reliable WiFi 5 performance with dual-band 2x2 MIMO and integrated antennas. Weighing only 89 grams and measuring just 12.5 mm thick, it fits easily into a laptop bag or pocket, making it a practical companion for business travelers, IT professionals, and remote workers who need consistent network access on the go.

detailed_description.heading: Secure Connection
detailed_description.text: Security is a core feature of the UniFi Travel Router. It supports industry-standard VPN technologies, including WireGuard and OpenVPN, allowing you to securely connect back to your home or corporate network from anywhere in the world. Built-in firewall functionality and port forwarding provide additional control over network traffic, helping protect connected devices when using public or untrusted networks. This makes UTR especially useful for professionals handling sensitive data or accessing internal resources remotely. The router can function as a VPN client, encrypting traffic automatically without requiring configuration on individual devices. Management is simple and flexible, with support for Ethernet and Bluetooth setup, and a built-in 1.14-inch status display that provides clear visual feedback on connectivity and device status. With low power consumption of just 5 W and USB-C power input, secure networking remains efficient and portable.

detailed_description.heading: Professional Features
detailed_description.text: Designed with mobility in mind, the UniFi Travel Router combines a clean, minimalist form factor with professional-grade features. The polycarbonate enclosure is durable yet lightweight, making it suitable for frequent travel. Two Gigabit Ethernet ports allow wired connections for laptops, desktops, or other network devices, while WiFi WAN support enables quick connection to hotel or guest networks. The router supports a wide range of legacy and modern WiFi standards, ensuring compatibility with existing infrastructure. Power is supplied via USB-C, using a standard 5V 2A source, so it can be powered from common adapters, power banks, or laptops. Operating reliably in temperatures from minus 10 to 40 degrees Celsius, UTR is suitable for various indoor environments. NDAA compliance and CE, FCC, and IC certifications further confirm its readiness for professional and regulated use.
